languages.text: Наследни{mf|к|ца} успел{mf||а} отдать команду вовремя, и люди замерли, беспрекословно повинуясь {mf|его|ее} воле. Раздались быстрые сигналы на {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}лингва-технис{/g} — шедшие в арьергарде Механикус медленно двинулись вперед, вскидывая плазменные ружья.

traits.locale_text: Наследни{mf|к|ца} успел{mf||а} отдать команду вовремя, и люди замерли, беспрекословно повинуясь {mf|его|ее} воле. Раздались быстрые сигналы на {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}лингва-технис{/g} — шедшие в арьергарде Механикус медленно двинулись вперед, вскидывая плазменные ружья.

languages.text: My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.
languages.original_text: Наследни{mf|к|ца} успел{mf||а} отдать команду вовремя, и люди замерли, беспрекословно повинуясь {mf|его|ее} воле. Раздались быстрые сигналы на {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}лингва-технис{/g} — шедшие в арьергарде Механикус медленно двинулись вперед, вскидывая плазменные ружья.

traits.locale_text: My heir gave the order in time, and everyone froze still in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Mechanicus in the rearguard began to advance slowly, raising their plasma guns.

My heir gave the order in time, and everyone froze still in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Mechanicus in the rearguard began to advance slowly, raising their plasma guns.

My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.

My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.

languages.text: Mi hereder{mf|o|a} dio la orden justo a tiempo y todos quedaron inmóviles, acatando su voluntad. Una serie de señales rápidas en {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Tecnis{/g} acompañó al avance de los tecnosacerdotes de la retaguardia, rifles de plasma en ristre.
languages.original_text: My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.

traits.locale_text: Mi hereder{mf|o|a} dio la orden justo a tiempo y todos quedaron inmóviles, acatando su voluntad. Una serie de señales rápidas en {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Tecnis{/g} acompañó al avance de los tecnosacerdotes de la retaguardia, rifles de plasma en ristre.

languages.text: Mon {mf|héritier|héritière} donna l'ordre juste à temps, et chacun se figea immédiatement. Des signaux rapides en {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g} retentirent tandis que les technoprêtres de l'arrière-garde avançaient lentement, leurs fusils à plasma pointés devant eux.
languages.original_text: My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.

traits.locale_text: Mon {mf|héritier|héritière} donna l'ordre juste à temps, et chacun se figea immédiatement. Des signaux rapides en {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g} retentirent tandis que les technoprêtres de l'arrière-garde avançaient lentement, leurs fusils à plasma pointés devant eux.

languages.text: 我的继承人及时下达了命令。所有人都完美遵从了其意志，立即停了下来。急促的{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}科技文{/g}信号响起，后卫部队的技术神甫们举着等离子枪缓缓前进。
languages.original_text: My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.

traits.locale_text: 我的继承人及时下达了命令。所有人都完美遵从了其意志，立即停了下来。急促的{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}科技文{/g}信号响起，后卫部队的技术神甫们举着等离子枪缓缓前进。

languages.text: {mf|Mein Erbe|Meine Erbin} erteilte im richtigen Moment den Befehl und alle gehorchten {mf|seinem|ihrem} Willen. Es ertönten scharfe Signale in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g}, als die Techpriester der Nachhut langsam mit erhobenen Plasmawerfern vorrückten.
languages.original_text: My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Mein Erbe|Meine Erbin} erteilte im richtigen Moment den Befehl und alle gehorchten {mf|seinem|ihrem} Willen. Es ertönten scharfe Signale in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g}, als die Techpriester der Nachhut langsam mit erhobenen Plasmawerfern vorrückten.

languages.text: Vârisim, emri tam zamanında verdi. Herkes onun iradesine kusursuz bir itaatle donakaldı. Artçılardaki Tekno Rahipler plazma silahlarını kaldırıp yavaşça ilerlerken {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g} dilinde hızlı sinyaller duyuldu.
languages.original_text: My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.

traits.locale_text: Vârisim, emri tam zamanında verdi. Herkes onun iradesine kusursuz bir itaatle donakaldı. Artçılardaki Tekno Rahipler plazma silahlarını kaldırıp yavaşça ilerlerken {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g} dilinde hızlı sinyaller duyuldu.

languages.text: 継承者である私は、ちょうどいいタイミングで命令を下し、全員が私の意志に完璧に従って動きを止めた。後衛のテクノ司祭たちがゆっくりと前進し、プラズマ銃を掲げるにつれて、{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}リンガテクニス{/g}の急速な信号が鳴り響いた。
languages.original_text: My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.

traits.locale_text: 継承者である私は、ちょうどいいタイミングで命令を下し、全員が私の意志に完璧に従って動きを止めた。後衛のテクノ司祭たちがゆっくりと前進し、プラズマ銃を掲げるにつれて、{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}リンガテクニス{/g}の急速な信号が鳴り響いた。
